title: Syleika Essentials
description: The base necessary mods to play on the Syleika SMP! The modpack is built for ease of use and smoothness!
body:
# Syleika Essentials
This Modpack is curated by the Staff on the Syleika SMP to ensure players have all the mods they need to join and enjoy the server in every aspect. The modpack also aims to be fairly optimized and contain as little clutter as possible in a singleplayer setting!

## Main Featureset
- **Optimized Gameplay**: The modpack features several optimization mods to ensure a straightforward and optimized gaming experience.
- **Simple Voice Proximity Chat**: The modpack features Simple Voice chat so players can communicate with each other through Minecraft itself.
- **Made for the Syleika SMP**: This modpack is made by the Server Staff of the Syleika SMP and optimized for said server. While you can use it for singleplayer the mods are added per need on said server!

**Pro Tip**: _If using for the Syleika SMP_! We format our versions in a fairly understandable manner, if you ever need to rollback to a previous modpack version here's an easy way to know which one to pick. 
- The first number marks the season of the Syleika SMP that version of the modpack was used in. 
- The second number, kinda doesn't mean anything besides a major required update was made to the modpack, we highly recommend not rolling back between major updates.
- The third (and last) number marks minor updates to a version (if there is any), these usually include removing client - side mods which you can optionally update to remove, or stay in a current version to keep.
